query:
UPDATE mcp_servers
                  SET name = COALESCE($2, name),
                      url = $3,
                      auth_type = $4,
                      auth_header_name = $5,
                      auth_value_enc = COALESCE($6, auth_value_enc),
                      requires_egress = $7,
                      status = CASE WHEN $8 THEN 'pending' ELSE status END,
                      updated_at = now()
                WHERE id = $1
